stimulus: Electric vehicles used by delivery companies in busy urban areas tend to be cheaper to fuel and quieter than most gasoline-powered ______ the production of the lithium-ion batteries that power them requires mining processes that can damage local ecosystems.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice A is correct. A comma with the coordinating conjunction "but" properly joins the two main clauses.

Choice B omits the comma before "but" between two longer main clauses. Choice C creates a run-on (no punctuation/conjunction). Choice D creates a comma splice (no conjunction).
